name: Entrex Carbon Market, Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1: DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS IN GENERAL We were incorporated on July 1, 2005 as "Regal Rock, Inc." under the laws of the state of Nevada. On December 3, 2007, we changed our name to "Regal Life Concepts, Inc.," and on March 31, 2010, we changed our name to "Regal Group, Inc." We commenced operations as a distributor of bamboo wood flooring products focused on opportunities created by demand in new residential construction and home improvement activity in North America.
